brandLine: TECHNOFLUID LUBRICANTS, a Brand of Lube Chem. Industries, India
about: Our company Lube Chem. Industries is spirited JAS-ANS ISO 9001: 2015 certified Company, deals in massive range of products which feeds wide sum of small and large industries all over India, dealing in lubricants SINCE 1971. We formulate & manufacture vast range of Industrial Oils, Automotive Lubricants, Greases and other Specialty Oils that is Transformer Oils and Rubber Process Oils by the brand name TECHNOFLUID as per the international quality standards. Characteristics like remarkable lubrication ability, high flashpoint, low volatility, and low pour point possess our lubricants. We formulate products for every application.

whyChooseUs.intro: With deep industry knowledge, advanced manufacturing capabilities, and a commitment to quality, TECHNOFLUID LUBRICANTS has built a strong reputation for:
whyChooseUs.closing: We take pride in offering tailor-made lubrication solutions to meet every industrial and automotive need.

ourCommitment: At TECHNOFLUID, we believe in continuous innovation and technological advancement, ensuring that our products not only meet but exceed industry expectations.
_sourceNote: Copy verbatim from Gaurav Verma WhatsApp, 31 Mar 2026. Tagline confirmed separately by Ansh. Certification corrected JAS-ANS->JAS-ANZ (about-prose keeps the verbatim wording).
